recommendations.title: Fingernails
recommendations.overview: Anna and Ryan have found true love together. It's been proven by a controversial test. There's just one problem: Anna still isn't sure. Then she meets Amir.

recommendations.title: Rupture
recommendations.overview: A single mom tries to break free from a mysterious organization that has abducted her.

recommendations.title: Live Twice, Love Once
recommendations.overview: A retired academic teacher tries to find the love of his youth after being diagnosed with Alzheimer's.

recommendations.title: Songbird

recommendations.title: Stowaway
recommendations.overview: A three-person crew on a mission to Mars faces an impossible choice when an unplanned passenger jeopardizes the lives of everyone on board.

recommendations.title: The Girl King
recommendations.overview: A portrait of the brilliant, extravagant Kristina of Sweden, queen from age six, who fights the conservative forces that are against her ideas to modernize Sweden and who have no tolerance for her awakening sexuality.

recommendations.title: The Bad Batch
recommendations.genres: Action, Horror, Mystery, Science Fiction, Thriller
recommendations.overview: After being exiled to a fenced-off wasteland, Arlen is kidnapped by a group of cannibals and goes on a journey to reunite a missing girl with her father.

recommendations.title: Inception: The Cobol Job
recommendations.overview: Cobb, Arthur and Nash are enlisted by Cobol Engineering.
